description_long: This apartment building complex features a central, large residential structure with a dark, multi-faceted roof, surrounded by several smaller apartment blocks of varying heights and colors. The buildings are arranged along a paved street lined with parked cars and interspersed with leafy green trees, creating a neighborhood feel. The facades of the apartment buildings display a mix of large, grid-like windows and solid wall sections, with some buildings featuring prominent window groupings. The central building appears to have a main entrance facing the street, with a driveway or small parking area in front. The surrounding buildings are boxy and modern, with flat or slightly sloped roofs and minimal decorative elements. The entire scene is set on a rectangular plot with green lawns on the periphery, suggesting a planned urban residential block.
description: A modern apartment building complex with a central large structure, surrounded by smaller residential blocks, tree-lined streets, and parked cars. The buildings feature flat and sloped roofs, large windows, and a mix of brick and concrete facades.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance of the central building, flanked by smaller apartment blocks and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the street with parked cars, the central building's roof, and the arrangement of surrounding buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central building, additional green space, and the alignment of the apartment blocks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the street, parked cars, and the facades of the apartment buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in regular, grid-like patterns with consistent spacing and alignment across the facades, contributing to a sense of symmetry and order.
